title: Canadian Pecan Stew
description: A hearty stew with a unique twist of pecans, perfect for the Canadian winter. This dish combines the classic stew flavors with the crunch of pecans.
instructions: Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add beef and cook until browned, about 5 minutes. Remove and set aside.
Add onion and garlic, cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add flour and cook for 1 minute.
Add beef broth, red wine, and tomato paste. Stir to combine.
Return beef to pot and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low and simmer, covered, for 2 hours.
Add thyme, salt, and pepper. Simmer for an additional 30 minutes.
Stir in chopped pecans. Serve hot.
